description: A section containing a grid of related page links, optionally preceded by a heading, arranged in a 3-column multicol layout.

props.name: links
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href: string; title?: string }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Quicklinks with a heading and three links

links.label: Watch the 2020 series
links.title: Watch the 2020 series of Boardroom masterclasses

links.label: Watch the 2022 series
links.title: Watch the 2022 series of Boardroom masterclasses

links.label: School of Geography and Planning alumni
links.title: School of Geography and Planning alumni

stories.name: CustomHeading
stories.description: Quicklinks with a custom heading and multiple links

stories.name: ManyLinks
stories.description: Quicklinks with six links spanning two rows

notes: The h3 heading is optional — some samples omit it entirely. Links are grouped into rows of up to 3 (medium-4 columns each) inside .multicol > .row.matchheight wrappers. The RelLink atom renders each individual link. The implement agent should chunk the links array into groups of 3, each group rendered as a .multicol > .row.matchheight > .medium-4.columns wrapper.
